prompt: My app has drag-and-drop for reordering items. A user with motor impairment can't use it. What WCAG criteria apply and how do I fix it for iOS?

assertions.text: References WCAG 2.5.7 (Dragging Movements) — new in WCAG 2.2
assertions.rationale: Skill rule 16 and WCAG 2.2 new criteria

assertions.text: Mentions minimum target size (24x24pt WCAG 2.5.8, or 44x44pt Apple HIG)
assertions.rationale: Skill rule 16: ensure minimum touch target size
